title: I’ve been using gstack as my open source software factory, turning Claude Code into a full virtual engineering team with roles like CEO, engineering manager, designer, QA, security, and release. It replaces the blank prompt with structured roles, bringing 20 specialists and 8 powerful tools together in one workflow, all written in Markdown and open for anyone to use and build on. If you are building, shipping, or leading, this is worth trying. https://github.com/garrytan/gstack
